name: 3pk Brass Candlestick Set - Hearth & Hand™ with Magnolia
description:
Elevate the look and feel of your home with this 3-Pack Candlestick Set from Hearth & Hand™ with Magnolia. This set includes three candle holders in a brass finish for elegant charm. Made of metal, these candle holders are compatible with pillar candles and feature pedestal bases for easy placement on any flat surface.

Hearth & Hand™ with Magnolia: Gather • Create • Enjoy
